tasks.label: Relay: Pull DB (staging)
tasks.command: gcloud compute ssh hostr-staging-compose --project hostr-staging-d4c52998 --zone us-central1-a --command "sqlite3 '/mnt/relay-data/nostr.db' 'PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);'" && gcloud compute scp hostr-staging-compose:/mnt/relay-data/nostr.db ${workspaceFolder:root}/docker/data/relay-snapshot.db --project hostr-staging-d4c52998 --zone us-central1-a && echo '✓ Saved to docker/data/relay-snapshot.db — click to open with SQLite Viewer'

tasks.label: Relay: Pull DB (production)
tasks.command: gcloud compute ssh hostr-production-compose --project hostr-production-d3ba05b4 --zone us-central1-a --command "sqlite3 '/mnt/relay-data/nostr.db' 'PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);'" && gcloud compute scp hostr-production-compose:/mnt/relay-data/nostr.db ${workspaceFolder:root}/docker/data/relay-snapshot.db --project hostr-production-d3ba05b4 --zone us-central1-a && echo '✓ Saved to docker/data/relay-snapshot.db — click to open with SQLite Viewer'
